description: Composition:Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic print on chestWash Care:Soft wash to avoid shrinkingFitting:Slim FitIf your spirit is adventure and adrenalin is your middle name, then this boarding tee from probase is perfect for you. Team this up with denims, slim fit jeans, corduroys or cargoes and remind everyone to live on the wild side. Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
